channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Parkinson's Treatment: Are Dopamine Agonists Losing Ground?
item.description: New debate over Parkinson's treatment highlights dopamine agonists, as clinicians weigh motor benefits against behavioral risks.

item.title: WHO Urges Europe to Boost Preparedness for Extreme Heat
item.description: Updated WHO guidance calls on clinicians and health systems to identify at-risk individuals early and strengthen prevention before extreme heat.

item.title: Do Older Adults Get Inappropriate Meds After Deprescribing?
item.description: When substitutions occur, more than 1 in 4 involve a potentially inappropriate medication, according to Medscape Medical News.

item.title: 86% of Brazilian Children With Disabling Musculoskeletal Pain Recover, Study Finds
item.description: Three out of every 10 Brazilian children and adolescents report musculoskeletal pain affecting bones, ligaments and muscles. This common problem often resolves.
